# OFD, LLC

> OFD, LLC is a locally owned commercial real estate company in Fairbanks, Alaska. OFD owns and leases warehouse, industrial, and downtown office space. Its properties are managed by Fairbanks Commercial Properties.

## Company
- Name: OFD, LLC (commercial real estate)
- Location: Fairbanks, Alaska, USA
- Managing Member: Seth Church
- Property management: Fairbanks Commercial Properties (https://www.fairbankscp.com)
- Phone: (907) 987-2095
- Email: properties.fairbanks@gmail.com
- Office: 300 Barnette Street, Suite 202, Fairbanks, AK 99701
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM
- Website: https://www.ofdllc.com/

## Properties for lease

### 399 Helmericks Avenue, Fairbanks, AK 99701 — Industrial / Warehouse
A 68,325 sq ft industrial campus across four buildings (built 1970 to 2018) on 6.17 acres, with 39 overhead doors, 14 ft clear ceilings, three-phase power in Building B, natural gas heat, a fenced gravel yard, active Alaska Railroad spurs along the south boundary, and GU-1 (General Use) zoning. About 34,600 sq ft is available for lease. Located minutes from Costco, Walmart, and Home Depot.
- Building A: 24,375 sq ft warehouse, 18 overhead doors
- Building B: 25,912 sq ft warehouse and office, three-phase power, 14 overhead doors
- Building C: 12,460 sq ft warehouse (fully leased)
- Building D: 5,674 sq ft, two-story office (built 2018)
The site has been heavily reinvested in over 2024 and 2025: new roofs, natural gas conversion, new concrete floors, new restrooms, and lighting upgrades.

### 300 Barnette Street, Fairbanks, AK 99701 — Downtown Office
A 17,000 sq ft, two-story office building in the heart of downtown Fairbanks, with multiple suites and efficient district hot water heat. Steps from the courthouse, state and federal offices, museums, and the Chena River.

## How to lease
For current availability, square footage, and lease terms, contact OFD's property manager, Fairbanks Commercial Properties, at (907) 987-2095 or properties.fairbanks@gmail.com. Lease terms and build-outs are shaped around each tenant's business.
